entry.value: Class: Rule Id/Name: Validation RoleAssignment Check Action: run in Debug Object Browser by User spadmin

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?> <!DOCTYPE String PUBLIC "sailpoint.dtd" "sailpoint.dtd"> <String>DATA FROM CODE: ad_business_role , cn=abdul.samad,ou=People,dc=my-domain,dc=com , LDAPApplication ad_business_role , CN=abdul samad,OU=People,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com , ActiveDirectory ad_business_role , CN=abdul samad,OU=People,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com , ADX BusinessRoleAccountingHtask , CN=abdul samad,OU=XPeople,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com , ADX roleExploration , CN=Abdul samad,OU=DefaultUsers,OU=People,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com , ActiveDirectory roleExploration , sr19 , WebServicesApplicationEshiam</String>
